benefits.description: Weight loss from 260 lbs to 190 lbs over 2 years on Tirzepatide. Recently upped dose to 20mg/week resulting in continued progress.

protocol_notes: User has been on Tirzepatide for 2 years. Tried Retatrutide with poor results. Plateaued at 190 lbs for 6 months before increasing dose to 20mg/week. Plans to cruise at 10-15mg/week maintenance long-term. Notes that Retatrutide and Tirzepatide overlap in mechanism so stacking is ineffective; recommends Cagrilintide as better stack option.
